headline: Is It Time To Reassess American Electric Power (AEP) After Strong Multi‑Year Gains?
summary: Wondering whether American Electric Power Company is fairly priced at around US$127.92, or if there is still value on the table? This article walks through the key numbers that matter. The stock has recently shown mixed returns, with a 4.6% decline over the last 7 days and a 1.1% decline over 30 days, set against gains of 10.5% year to date and 26.9% over 1 year. Recent coverage has focused on the stock's strong longer term performance, including returns of 61.7% over 3 years and 78.7% over...
